arxiv.title: DeltaScore: Fine-Grained Story Evaluation with Perturbations
arxiv.abstract: Numerous evaluation metrics have been developed for natural language generation tasks, but their effectiveness in evaluating stories is limited as they are not specifically tailored to assess intricate aspects of storytelling, such as fluency and interestingness. arxiv.title: Automated Interactive Domain-Specific Conversational Agents that Understand Human Dialogs
arxiv.abstract: Achieving human-like communication with machines remains a classic, challenging topic in the field of Knowledge Representation and Reasoning and Natural Language Processing. arxiv.title: Gated Compression Layers for Efficient Always-On Models
arxiv.abstract: Mobile and embedded machine learning developers frequently have to compromise between two inferior on-device deployment strategies: sacrifice accuracy and aggressively shrink their models to run on dedicated low-power cores; or sacrifice battery by running larger models on more powerful compute core

arxiv.title: Towards an Hybrid Hodgkin-Huxley Action Potential Generation Model
arxiv.abstract: Mathematical models for the generation of the action potential can improve the understanding of physiological mechanisms that are consequence of the electrical activity in neurons. In such models, some equations involving empirically obtained functions of the membrane potential are usually defined.

arxiv.title: MAtch, eXpand and Improve: Unsupervised Finetuning for Zero-Shot Action Recognition with Language Knowledge
arxiv.abstract: Large scale Vision-Language (VL) models have shown tremendous success in aligning representations between visual and text modalities. arxiv.title: Forecasting Particle Accelerator Interruptions Using Logistic LASSO Regression
arxiv.abstract: Unforeseen particle accelerator interruptions, also known as interlocks, lead to abrupt operational changes despite being necessary safety measures. arxiv.title: Reinforce Data, Multiply Impact: Improved Model Accuracy and Robustness with Dataset Reinforcement
arxiv.abstract: We propose Dataset Reinforcement, a strategy to improve a dataset once such that the accuracy of any model architecture trained on the reinforced dataset is improved at no additional training cost for users. arxiv.title: CS-TGN: Community Search via Temporal Graph Neural Networks
arxiv.abstract: Searching for local communities is an important research challenge that allows for personalized community discovery and supports advanced data analysis in various complex networks, such as the World Wide Web, social networks, and brain networks. arxiv.title: Exploring the Relevance of Data Privacy-Enhancing Technologies for AI Governance Use Cases
arxiv.abstract: The development of privacy-enhancing technologies has made immense progress in reducing trade-offs between privacy and performance in data exchange and analysis. arxiv.title: Large-scale End-of-Life Prediction of Hard Disks in Distributed Datacenters
arxiv.abstract: On a daily basis, data centers process huge volumes of data backed by the proliferation of inexpensive hard disks.
